feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S/4 HANA Cloud Public2402: How to enhance "Item data" within the "repair order" app in the launchpad
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

We are working on the newest version of S/4 HANA Cloud: Public edition version 2402 and would like to enhance the "item section" in the "display repair order" application within the launchpad (Application ID: "TBT116RPO")

The requirement is to add new custom columns within the item section, which can be manually modifiable by users and whose content should be controlled later on during the SAVE operation (when creating or updating a repair order):

 My main issue right now is adding these new columns with the custom data.

 

First, when checking the application itself, looks like this is not a fiori application build in with the UI5 framework, but rather with the "WCF" framework:

Application details in the fiori launchpad

This is confirmed with the documentation found in the fiori reference library, where this app seems not to be a fully Fiori application, but rather a "Web Client UI application"

Application details within the fiori reference library

When trying the key user extensibility, in order to find the suitable "business context" to use to create new custom fields for the new columns to add at the "repair order item" level, somehow the key user extensibility tool does not provide a "plus +" icon (which normally opens directly the "custom fields and logic" fiori application with the suitable business context). The "Adapt UI" on the "repair order" application only seems to allow to move sections up and down: 

Key user extensibility not available at the repair order app?

Thus, I am wondering whether key user extensibility works on such Web UI applications, I guess not? am I wrong?

Since the key user extensibility "did not provide me" the direct access to the "custom fields and logic" app with the suitable business context, I started digging in SAP ADT and I felt like the I_ServiceDocumentItem data definition is the one "behind" the repair orders item list (service Object type = "BUS2000116") as shown in the example below: 

I_ServiceDocumentItem is the data definition behind the "Repair order" item screen

Based on this, I used the "custom fields and logic" app to create one new custom field "YY1_SrvItemDis" under the business context: "Service Item" which I have enabled on the "Service transaction item I_Service DocumentItem". This lead to extending the I_ServiceDocumentItem structure with a new custom field: 

Custom field added at the repair order item level

I was hoping that this first action will allow me to "add new custom data" at item level, for a repair order, which now "only" needs to be shown in the launchpad app "display repair order".

Is this first action am taking correct to fuflill my requirement? Will I be able by following these steps to add the new custom field "YY1_SrvItemDis" as a new column in the item level at the "repair order" screen? Will this require from me to extend "R_ServiceDocumentItemTP" or maybe "C_InhRepairOpenRepairOrderItem" or maybe both? Or am I going into an incorrect direction?

Is my requirement "feasible" in a S/4 HANA Cloud public edition environment?

Thank you all in advance

entry.title: special characters are not getting converted sometimes while Outbound IDOC is triggered from S4 Sys
entry.content:
Hi All,

IDOC(SUBMAS01) is being sent from EHS S4 system to SAP PO middleware and its being successfully processed E2E (SAP S4->PO->Downstream sys) for some of the EHS Specifications. But recently EHS is migrated from ECC to S4 and after data migration when some of the specifications are triggered from EHS IDOC is coming to middleware but special Characters are not getting converted to unicode  (e.g<DATAORIGIN>EH&S</DATAORIGIN> to <DATAORIGIN>EH&S</DATAORIGIN>) and in xml if its not getting converted its failing in middleware since these characters((&,<= ) makes xml as non well formed xml.

Could you please let us know what could be reason that some specifications IDOC gets triggered with unicode conversion for special characters(&,<=) and for some specifications IDOC is not converting these special characters to unicode.

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: SAP RAP : Read Method is not triggered for Filter Condition or any read operation
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I have a Simple requirement for Rest Read API where using SAP RAP.

The requirement is to send Error message for while read API based on Search parameters .

I Created BO objects and try to implement Read method for same but read Method is not triggering .

Thanks in advance for helping .

 

URL : https://1374dadc-372f-46e3-a692-b2bd57ae0ee4.abap-web.us10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata4/sap/yap_testview_srv_o4/srvd/sap/yap_testview_srv/0001/YAP_CDS_VIEW_NEW1?$filter=(TravelID%20eq%20%27816%27)

entry.title: Deactivate incremental search in ABAP editor
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there any way to deactivate incremental search in the ABAP editor? For some reason, when  I press CTRL+F it works the same as CTRL+I.

The keyboard options in the settings seem to be ok.

TIA,

Luis

entry.title: Table refresh after bound RAP action execution on multiple items is not working
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a Fiori Elements App using unmanaged RAP scenario on ODataV4. 

The Actions are defined with parameters and result (+invocationGroup = #ChangeSet). When executing it on a single table line item, the reload works perfectly. But, when executing the action on multiple table items (multi selection), the reload is not working and i have to push the Search button to get my new created entries.

In BAS, I enabled the scroll and navigation to entity and tried with side effects, but without success. 

What am I doing wrong or what is to configure on BAS or anything else? Any ideas/examples?

 

Thx and BR Eddy

SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP Development ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Release API-State Error "Retrieved API version of object is inconsistent" RAP, BTP
entry.content:
Hi experts!

when trying to release an API-State of an object in customer namespace I get an error "Retrieved API version of object is inconsistent". I created a simple class with one method. I did the same in the z-namespace and everything worked fine. 

Does anyone know how to solve this error?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Error while deleting object in eclipse - object does not exist (BTP)
entry.content:
Hi experts! I imported a package with objects (classes,...) from github into eclipse/ABAP Environment.

When I try to open a class, I get a message that the object does not exist. When I try to delete the object, I get the same message. When I try to delete the package I get a message that the package cannot be deleted because it contains objects. Push/pull from/to github doesn't work. I get a message "eclipse doesn't respond" and I have to close eclipse. Unlink the github repository and link it again didn't work also.

Does anyone know, how I can delete the not existing objects and package?

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: Error by Logon eclipse
entry.content:
Hello SAP Comunity, 

I have a free Trail account . I am currently facing a problem while trying to log on my ABAP Cloud project in eclipse. I am getting the following error : Error while logging on the service instance using this project. Please make sure that you are logging on with : my email address. Although I simultaneously get the following message im Browser:  You have been successfully logged on: You can close this page and continue in the ABAP Development Tools. 

The trial account has only one E-mail Address. 

Yesterday, it was working perfectly but I tried the wohle day to relog in eclipse , restart it , restart windows, deleted the data in cache. But nothing seems to work unfortuantly. 

Thanks in advance

Best regards 

sisi

entry.title: You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I created (or better) copied an interface from z-namespace to customer-namespace in BTP ABAP Environment.

I cannot activate or delete the object and get an error message "You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)". I checked also note https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3303363. I have all write permissions and the ABAP Language is "ABAP for Cloud Development". I can see that the Transport Request is "Local".

This is wrong and may cause the problem. When checking the correct TR, I can see the object

Does anyone know, how to solve this issue?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Error by Logon to the SAP Cloud System
entry.content:
Hello SAP Comunity, 

I have a free Trail account . I am currently facing a problem while trying to log on my ABAP Cloud project in eclipse. I am getting the following error : Error while logging on the service instance using this project. Please make sure that you are logging on with : my email address. Although I simultaneously get the following message im Browser:  You have been successfully logged on: You can close this page and continue in the ABAP Development Tools. 

The trial account has only one E-mail Address. 

Yesterday, it was working perfectly but I tried the wohle day to relog in eclipse , restart it , restart windows, deleted the data in cache. But nothing seems to work unfortuantly. 

Thanks in advance

Best regards 

sisi

entry.title: Deployment Error "ABAP language version is not supported for objecttype WAPA."
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently doing the tutorial Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials and am stuck on the deployment of my app. However, the test deployment worked. I get the error message: "ABAP language version is not supported for objecttype WAPA."

Consequently, I wanted to change the default ABAP language version in Eclipse via General Data. However, only ABAP for Cloud Development is displayed.

What do I have to change to be able to display and select the other languages, as shown here: 

Source: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/sap-s4hana-cloud-restrict-users-change-billing-block-in-sales-order/qaq-p/12820451

Does anyone have a solution for me?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error while consuming S/4 On premise oData from ABAP on Cloud Environment
entry.content:
Hello Team

I am trying to consume the oData from S/4 HANA on Premise system to ABAP Environment.

I can see the response in ABAP Environment checked via ABAP  cross track call but I am getting exception as well.

 

Below is the response 

 

 

Below exception is coming while executing the method lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).

 

  Exception : Error returned by virus scanner (Profile /IWBEP/CP/ODATA_DOWNLOAD) 

 

 

 

We have activated/deactivated the virus scan profile from backend but still system is raising this exception.. 

Below is the full code 

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZSCM_ZSEMERGENCY'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZCSOS_test_CDS/' ).

 

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'ZCSOS_test' )->create_request_for_read( ).

lo_request->set_top( 50 )->set_skip( 0 ).

 

" Execute the request and retrieve the business data

lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).

lo_response->get_business_data( IMPORTING et_business_data = lt_business_data ).

entry.title: What is the preferred way of data fetch from HANA view in ABAP Program
entry.content:
Hello All,

I see the following options to fetch data from HANA view in ABAP program, would like to know, what is the preferred way:

1. Create an AMDP, and fetch data from HANA view inside AMDP, and use it in program,

2. Create an external view, and fetch data from the view,

3. Use native SQL.

Thanks & Regards,

Naga

entry.title: Lowest SAP ECC version that can be integrated with SAP BTP through Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there a reference webpage that outlines the lowest SAP ECC version that can integrated with SAP BTP through SAP Cloud Connector? I could search the SAP application help page for SAP Cloud Connector, but it only outlines the OS and the CPU that are supported.

My client is on SAP ECC 6.0 EHP6 and wants to integrate with SAP BTP. Is this version supported for integration with BTP?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to Create Application Job in SAP ABAP Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

please use appropriate SAP Managed Tags - such as "ABAP Development and "ABAP RESTful application programming model" - when creating questions or blog posts. 

You may have a look at this blog post by Andre Fischer:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-schedule-application-jobs-from-a-rap-based-business-object/ba-p/13553507 

Kind regards,
Carine

entry.title: Unschedule a CRM Action
entry.content:
I have an action with a schedule condition and a start condition.

I want to schedule it when my object has a specific status.

Then I want to start it on a specific date.

If the status changes before that specific date, I want to delete that scheduled action and not trigger it when the date comes.

How can I do that?

entry.title: Validations on 'Apply' in restful ABAP
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an application(draft enabled) developed using restful abap where I have a parent entity and child entity.
The child entity has few mandatory fields which I am validating using validations.
But the validations gets triggered when I save the BO.

I want the validations to be triggered when I go to the child entity and hit 'Apply' without entering the mandatory fields.

Please let me know if there is way I can achieve this.

entry.title: SQL Syntax error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to create a AMDP class to get the current date as the output of the class. And i need to call this class in the BW transformations. Please find the sample code that i wrote.

 

CLASS Today_date DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .
  PUBLIC SECTION.

  INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.
  class-methods amdp_procedure
  exporting
  value(i_sydat) type dats.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS Today_date IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD amdp_procedure by database procedure
                   for hdb
                   language sqlscript
                   options read-only.
                  
i_sydat = (cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ));
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

 I am getting the syntax error in Line number 21. The error is SQLSCRIPT: sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near "=>" . Could you please help on, how to correct this error. And also how to call this clss inside BW transformation ?

And in the transformation,

ZLOADING_DATE = CALL "TODAY_DATE=>AMDP_PROCEDURE(i_SYDAT)

Pls correct me, if i am wrong.

entry.title: PPE tcode
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want to update source code in PPE transaction. is there any bapi or function module to update?

Thnx in advance 🙂

entry.title: ECP connectivity with MBC (Mutli Bank Connectivity)
entry.content:
Hi Team - Has anyone worked with MBC before in HR Payroll landscape? If yes, what's the best practice recommendation around ECP connecting with MBC. I understand it's typical to connect S/4 HANA with MBC however, any recommendations around connecting ECP would be appreciated. 

Thanks,
